page.privacy.metaDescription: How Mochileaf uses cookies and third-party services including Google AdSense.
page.privacy.title: Privacy policy
page.privacy.description: Plain-language notes for visitors and ad partners.
page.privacy.intro: Mochileaf (“we”, “the site”) is a fan-made cozy gaming site at mochileaf.com. This page explains what data may be collected when you browse.
page.privacy.theme: Theme preference — stored in your browser (localStorage, key mochileaf-theme) so light/dark mode persists.
page.privacy.analytics: Hosting analytics — our host (e.g. Vercel) may log requests, IPs, and user agents for security and performance. See their privacy policy for details.
page.privacy.adsBody: We may show ads through Google AdSense. Google and its partners use cookies to serve ads based on your visits to this and other sites. You can learn more or opt out of personalized advertising at
page.privacy.externalBody: Some pages load images from third-party CDNs (for example item icons) or link to Pinterest, YouTube, and game wikis. Those services have their own privacy policies.
page.privacy.contactBody: Questions about this policy? Reach out via the contact method listed on our
page.aboutGiggi.metaDescription: Meet Giggi — cozy gaming creator from Argentina sharing dreamy games, desk setups, and a little corner of comfort on Mochileaf.
page.aboutGiggi.heading: Hi lovelies! 🌸✨
page.aboutGiggi.p1: I’m Giggi, a cozy content creator from Argentina who’s completely in love with cozy gaming, Studio Ghibli vibes, pastel aesthetics, and cute little things that make everyday life feel magical 🧸🎐
page.aboutGiggi.p2: I created this space to share cozy games, dreamy desk setups, gaming inspiration, and a little corner of comfort for anyone who loves slow mornings, soft lights, relaxing worlds, and wholesome communities. Whether you’re here looking for your next cozy game obsession or just want to feel inspired while sipping your favorite drink, you’re always welcome here 💕
page.aboutGiggi.p3: When I’m not creating content, you’ll probably find me collecting manga, building cute keyboard setups, organizing my desk, watching anime, or spending time with my two pitbulls, Pipo and Nina 🌷✨
page.aboutGiggi.p4: This website is my little cozy world on the internet, and I’m so happy you’re here 🍃
page.aboutGiggi.story1: Mochileaf started as a small personal dream — a cozy little corner on the internet made for people who love relaxing games, comforting spaces, and creative inspiration 🌿✨
page.aboutGiggi.story2: At first, I simply wanted to build a place where cozy gamers could discover new games, setups, creators, and wholesome projects. But along the way, Mochileaf became something much more personal to me. It turned into a fun creative project where I could learn, experiment, and improve my web design and development skills while building something that truly feels like “me” 🧸💻
page.aboutGiggi.story3: One of my biggest goals with Mochileaf is to create a collaborative space where content creators and indie game developers can share little pieces of their projects, passions, and creativity with the community. I love the idea of supporting talented people, discovering hidden gems, and helping cozy projects feel seen and appreciated 🌸
page.aboutGiggi.story4: At the same time, I hope Mochileaf can continue growing into a real business and creative journey that allows me to keep evolving professionally, create new opportunities, and generate extra income to support my dreams. One of my biggest dreams is to visit Japan someday — a place that has inspired so much of the cozy and magical aesthetic behind everything I create 🍃✨
page.aboutGiggi.story5: More than anything, Mochileaf is a space built with love, creativity, curiosity, and the hope of making the internet feel a little softer and more inspiring for cozy gamers around the world 🤍
page.aboutGiggi.name1: When I was choosing a name, I knew I wanted something cozy — a little generic and open enough to hold the worlds I love, but still tender and warm. Something that could wrap around games, setups, creators, and quiet inspiration without feeling boxed in.
page.aboutGiggi.name2: I played with a few ideas, and Mochileaf was the one that felt most like home: soft, peaceful, and comforting, like a place you’d want to settle into with a warm drink. It’s cozy on purpose — the kind of name that whispers “take your time” instead of shouting for attention 🍃
page.aboutGiggi.closing: I really hope you enjoy what I’m building here. Make yourself comfortable, wander at your own pace, and if any ideas, feedback, or cozy discoveries come to mind — I’d genuinely love to hear from you 💕
page.aboutGiggi.contactBody: Whether it’s a game we should cover, a creator to feature, a typo you spotted, or just a cozy hello — reach out anytime. I read every message when I can and I’m always happy to chat.
